mapper.select:
SELECT tr.role_seq ,tr.role_cd ,tr.role_nm ,tr.role_desc ,tr.use_flag ,tr.rgst_user_id ,tr.rgst_date_time ,tr.upt_user_id ,tr.upt_date_time FROM tb_role tr WHERE 1=1
AND tr.role_cd LIKE '%' || #{roleCd} || '%'
AND tr.role_nm LIKE '%' || #{roleNm} || '%'
AND tr.use_flag = #{useFlag}
ORDER BY role_seq

SELECT tru.role_user_seq ,tru.role_seq ,tru.user_seq ,tu.user_id ,tu.user_name AS user_nm ,tru.str_date ,tru.end_date ,tru.use_flag ,tru.rgst_user_id ,tru.rgst_date_time ,tru.upt_user_id ,tru.upt_date_time FROM tb_role_user tru INNER JOIN tb_role tr ON tru.role_seq = tr.role_seq LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user tu ON tru.user_seq = tu.user_seq WHERE 1=1 AND tr.role_seq = #{roleSeq} ORDER BY tru.role_user_seq
